title: Using LineInspector Objects
description:
Using LineInspector Objects

Using LineInspector Objects

Now that we've reviewed how LineInspector works we have set the foundation for understanding how to use Vision Guide LineInspector objects.  This next section will describe the steps required to use LineInspector objects as listed below:

How to create a new LineInspector object
Position and Size the search window
Configure the properties associated with the LineInspector object
Test the LineInspector object & examine the results
Make adjustments to properties and test again

Prior to starting the steps shown below, you should have already created a new vision sequence or selected a vision sequence to use. If you have no vision sequence to work with, you can create a new vision sequence by clicking on the New Sequence  toolbar button.  You can also select a sequence which was created previously by clicking on the Sequence tree in the Vision Guide window.  See Vision Sequences for details on how to create a new vision sequence or select one which was previously defined.

Step 1: Create a New LineInspector Object

Step 2: Positioning the LineInspector object

Step 3: Configuring Properties for the LineInspector Object
